entity.summary: Malta-based centralized digital-asset exchange and institutional trading platform whose current BEQUANT Global service launched in August 2022 as part of the wider BEQUANT group.
entity.notes: The BEQUANT group predates the current BEQUANT Global exchange service. HEI uses August 8, 2022 as the launch date for the present retail and professional exchange line, while preserving the broader group identity and Malta origin.

events.title: BEQUANT Global launched
events.description: BEQUANT launched BEQUANT Global as a new exchange business line for retail and professional digital-asset traders.
events.notes: The wider BEQUANT group and institutional platform existed before this launch; this event marks the current exchange service line.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bequant
evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference used to corroborate the Bequant exchange identity.

evidence.title: BEQUANT group overview and Malta headquarters
evidence.notes: Official group overview identifies Malta-incorporated group companies and the Malta headquarters.

evidence.title: Bequant Global launches on August 8th, 2022
evidence.notes: Official launch announcement for the current BEQUANT Global exchange service.

evidence.title: BEQUANT Global markets overview
evidence.notes: Current official support material documents active BEQUANT Global markets and trading support.
